channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Neurons must break DNA to build the brain, study finds
item.description: New research shows that developing neurons need to break their DNA to navigate tight spaces and reach their destinations.

item.title: Human anatomy still holds surprises, scientists say
item.description: Researchers continue to uncover new details and overlooked structures in the human body, challenging long-held assumptions.

item.title: The first primates may have evolved in the cold, not the tropics
item.description: A surprising new study suggests the earliest primates didn't originate in tropical forests but in cold, dry parts of North America. Some may have even...

item.title: The secret language behind animal cooperation
item.description: Animals from different species often rely on surprisingly sophisticated communication to work together, whether finding food, cleaning parasites, or g...
